key_findings.fence_issue: need fence, last_fence=0x0 — transfer pipe has no valid fence to wait on
key_findings.flush_behavior: reuse last_fence with empty remaining set

root_cause: Transfer pipe (ctx=20) submits blit/copy command but cannot synchronize with compute pipe (ctx=17) because last_fence=0x0. The fd_batch fence coordination between separate KGSL contexts is broken — Gallium assumes DRM syncobj/fence_fd which KGSL path does not provide.
first_failing_function: fd_resource_transfer_map → needs fence from compute batch → fence is NULL → transfer IB submitted blind → result undefined
implication: This is the exact mechanism: Gallium freedreno uses inter-pipe fences for transfer synchronization. KGSL backend does not produce valid fences between contexts. Transfer submits without waiting → data not coherent → err=-5 propagated to OpenCL layer.
